# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES = ['auth-token', 'token', 'session', 'access_token'];
const PUBLIC_PATHS = ['/', '/login', '/signup', '/forgot-password'];
const AUTH_PAGES = ['/login', '/signup'];
const PUBLIC_FILE = /\.(.*)$/;

function getAuthToken(request: NextRequest): string | null {
  for (const name of AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES) {
    const value = request.cookies.get(name)?.value;
    if (value && isValidToken(value)) {
      return value;
    }
  }
  return null;
}

function isValidToken(token: string): boolean {
  if (!token || token.trim().length === 0) return false;

  const parts = token.split('.');
  if (parts.length === 3) {
    try {
      const payload = JSON.parse(
        decodeBase64Url(parts[1])
      ) as { exp?: number };

      if (payload.exp && Date.now() >= payload.exp * 1000) {
        return false;
      }

      return true;
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  return token.length >= 16;
}

function decodeBase64Url(value: string): string {
  const base64 = value.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');
  const padded = base64.padEnd(base64.length + ((4 - (base64.length % 4)) % 4), '=');

  if (typeof atob === 'function') {
    return atob(padded);
  }

  return Buffer.from(padded, 'base64').toString('utf-8');
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some((path) => pathname === path || pathname.startsWith(`${path}/`));
}

function isAuthPage(pathname: string): boolean {
  return AUTH_PAGES.some((path) => pathname === path || pathname.startsWith(`${path}/`));
}

export function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname, search } = request.nextUrl;

  if (
    pathname.startsWith('/_next') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/api/public') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/favicon.ico') ||
    PUBLIC_FILE.test(pathname)
  ) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  const token = getAuthToken(request);
  const isAuthenticated = Boolean(token);
  const publicRoute = isPublicPath(pathname);
  const authPage = isAuthPage(pathname);

  if (!isAuthenticated && !publicRoute) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    const redirectTo = `${pathname}${search}`;
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', redirectTo);
    return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
  }

  if (isAuthenticated && authPage) {
    const redirectUrl = new URL('/dashboard', request.url);
    return NextResponse.redirect(redirectUrl);
  }

  return NextResponse.next();
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ['/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)'],
};
